creator: chrisc@vmunix.com
text:
Hi,

Murray, thanks for patching that.  I think it looks good the way you did
it.

I realized that I typoed the general FreeBSD link to BSDmall.com that I
listed, I cut n pasted the FreeBSD 4.4 link instead, which was what I
used in the patch.

The real link for FreeBSD in general on bsdmall.com is
http://www.bsdmall.com/freebsd1.html

Thanks.

-Chris
